description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a medium build, dressed in a loose, vertically striped button-up shirt and dark, slightly distressed jeans. He wears open-toed sandals and a black face mask that covers his nose and mouth. His hair is styled in a spiky, voluminous fashion, adding a distinctive flair to his appearance. The figure's hands are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is upright and casual, suggesting he is at ease in an urban environment. The clothing and accessories are typical of a modern city dweller, blending comfort with a touch of individuality.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a striped shirt, dark jeans, sandals, a face mask, and spiky hair, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped shirt, face mask, spiky hair, and relaxed stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face mask, shirt sleeve, and the side of the jeans and sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the striped shirt, jeans, and the full hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, with similar features to the left side, including the shirt, jeans, and sandals.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt and jeans with a face mask
